name: Never Fail Sourdough French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix hot water, honey or sugar, and butter or margarine in a large ceramic mixing bowl.
2. Cool mixture to lukewarm.
3. Add yeast, sourdough starter, salt, and flour one cup at a time until a stiff dough forms.
4. Turn dough out onto a floured board and knead for 5 to 8 minutes.
5. Place in an oiled bowl and cover; let rise until doubled in bulk.
6. Punch down the dough and let it rise for 30 minutes.
7. Turn the dough out onto a floured board and let it sit for 10 minutes.
8. Form into long or round loaf, or into rolls, and place in a well greased pan or cookie sheet.
9. Let rise again until doubled.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 55 minutes, or until brown.
11. Makes 1 large loaf or 8 to 12 rolls.
SUGGESTIONS: The bread will rise more quickly if salt is omitted. Use only ceramic or wood bowls and utensils as metal causes the dough to set up like cement when left to dry. Grease pans generously with shortening before baking.
